ASTValidators: Accepted/Ignored. Validates raw source code files (*.ts, *.tsx), not the architecture blueprint.
FunctionalValidators: Accepted/Ignored. These evaluate rendered output and database states.
PlaceholderValidators: Accepted/Ignored. Checks for hardcoded placeholder text in files.
Verdict: Adding a `capabilities` array to the architecture schema will not break any downstream validators because validators operate on the generated file system output, not the internal configuration JSON.
